# Inbox by MailSoar

> Free email deliverability testing tool. Check if your emails land in the Inbox, Spam, or Promotions folder.

## Pages
- [Home (FR)](https://inbox.mailsoar.com/?lang=fr): Test de délivrabilité email gratuit
- [Home (EN)](https://inbox.mailsoar.com/?lang=en): Free email deliverability test

## About
Inbox by MailSoar is a tool created by MailSoar, an international email deliverability consulting agency. It allows users to test email placement across major providers (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo) and analyze SPF, DKIM, DMARC configuration.

## Main site
https://mailsoar.com
